blocks.text: Arsenal into the semis — and City await Sunday

Liverpool out via PSG; Bayern 4-3 at the Bernabéu was the night's drama. Arsenal edged past Sporting — the team that ended Bodø/Glimt's European dream — and now sit six clear of City ahead of Sunday's Etihad showdown.
🎮 LIVE — rain hunting CS2 Major glory at IEM Rio 2026
